content:
Time is Running Out!

The countdown has begun! 
Don't miss your chance to participate in the 1st National Article Writing Competition 2026 hosted by JurisGrid.

Theme: Law in the Age of Technological Transformation: Contemporary Legal Challenges and Policy Responses. 

If you're passionate about legal research, policy, AI, digital governance, or emerging technologies, this is your opportunity to showcase your ideas on a national platform.

Why Participate?
*Exciting Cash Prizes
*Certificate of merit for top performer
*Certificate for Every Participant
*Enhance Your CV with a National-Level Achievement. 

📅 Last Date for Registration: 20 July 2026

Seats are filling fast—register today and make your voice count. 

Register now through the link
https://lnkd.in/geireiw3

#JurisGrid #ArticleWritingCompetition #RegisterFast #LawStudents #LegalResearch #LegalWriting #TechnologyAndLaw #ArtificialIntelligence #CyberLaw #LegalInnovation #LawSchool #ResearchCompetition #FutureLawyers #NationalCompetition #LegalAcademia #PolicyResearch #LawAndTechnology
comment: The challenge ahead is not just adopting new technologies, but defining accountability, transparency, and rights frameworks when automated systems influence legal decisions and public policy.
